## Finding
After P11, raw main still exposed `.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml` as an empty or invalid active workflow file. Empty `.yml` in `.github/workflows` is still an active parser hazard.

## Change
The active workflow file was moved out of `.github/workflows` into `governance/workflows_disabled/`.

## Gate decision
Release PASS remains false. Current goal is parser cleanliness. Governance validation workflow restoration is deferred until a safe YAML writer is proven.

## Next
